response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed geospatial pipelines — critical for this role. His DLang and Node.js work shows systems-level aptitude, but the absence of modern C++ in production routing systems and minimal evidence of distributed systems or real-time traffic integration raises significant gaps.
strengths: Proven geospatial project experience via open-source GISCollective platform
Strong systems-level programming background with DLang and low-latency systems
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks
concerns: No demonstrated professional experience with C++ or Rust in routing or navigation contexts
Lacks clear evidence of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time traffic integration
Career gap and recent roles focus on web/full-stack, not geospatial data pipelines
